Localization.Description: Attempt to check access rights of a user

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} checked access rights of user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to check user access rights on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is checking access rights of user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
